name: Terminals Data
tagline: Real-time bus schedule monitoring and analytics for terminals
description: A data pipeline and analytics dashboard for monitoring intercity bus schedules across terminals. Scrapes departure data from terminal websites, tracks schedule statuses in real-time (open, closing, closed, cancelled), and provides analytical insights. Includes Telegram bot alerts for delayed buses and background jobs for continuous data updates.
highlights: Real-time bus schedule scraping and status tracking across terminals
Background jobs for continuous departure monitoring and status updates
Telegram bot integration for delay alerts and notifications
Analytics dashboard with data tables, charts, and CSV export
Multi-line, multi-terminal architecture with seat availability tracking
